info.title: NestAPI
info.description: Seed spec with a representative subset of endpoints. Replaced on every API deployment by the pipeline that fetches /openapi, converts it to OpenAPI 3.0, and commits it here. Do not hand-edit.

tags.name: nesting
tags.description: Submit nesting jobs, retrieve results and exports

tags.name: public
tags.description: Health check and public utility endpoints

post.summary: Identity behind the current API key

200.description: Details of the account the key belongs to.

post.description: Submit base64-encoded DXF files with the sheets to nest onto and the nesting settings. Returns a RequestId immediately; the completed ApiNestingResult is delivered asynchronously to your ResultsWebhookUri.

Request.description: The nesting payload (Base64NestingRequest): base64 DXF parts, sheets, and settings.

ResultsWebhookUri.description: Webhook URI the ApiNestingResult is POSTed to on completion.

AutomaticallyStartNesting.description: If true, nesting starts immediately. If false, connect to SignalR then call /nesting/delayedstart.

200.description: Nesting request accepted. Returns a RequestId for tracking.

400.description: Invalid request — check file encoding or missing required fields.

get.description: Confirms the key is active and returns basic identity info.

bearerAuth.description: API key sent as a Bearer token: Authorization: Bearer <key>.
